creator: issei@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
1. Update ssh version from 1.2.26 to 1.2.27.
	2. Make default configuration of sshd server more
           secure (patches/patch-ae).

	Deleted patch files:
		patch-aj	-
		patch-ap	merge to patch-ab
		patch-ar	merge to patch-ag
		patch-at	ssh-1.2.27 includes this patch
		patch-au	ssh-1.2.27 includes this patch
		patch-av	ssh-1.2.27 includes this patch

Fix: Apply the following patch to the port-current.
